issues.description: SearchDeck filter is incomplete and inverted. Card text requires: looking at 4 cards from top, revealing UP TO 1 card matching {Straw Hat Crew} OR {Heart Pirates} with cost ≥2 (not ≤2), adding to hand, then placing rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches by cost and lacks: card count limit (4), type filter ({Straw Hat Crew}|{Heart Pirates}), cost direction (≥2 not ≤2), and deck positioning logic for remaining cards.
Filter specifies maxCost:2, but card text requires cost of '2 or more' (minCost ≥2). Direction is reversed.
Missing type filter for {Straw Hat Crew} or {Heart Pirates}. Filter should include cardType/hasType condition.
Missing logic to look at only 4 cards from deck top and reorder rest at bottom. SearchDeck action as specified does not support viewing/reordering subset of deck.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} or {Heart Pirates} type card with a cost of 2 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
